title: BEM-947 post-push reverify
objective:
Run script:
"""
def write_file(path, text):
    p=Path(path)
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(p))

write_file('governance/reports/BEM947_POST_PUSH_REVERIFY.md', '''# BEM-947 | Post-push reverify after BEM-946
Status: POST_PUSH_REVERIFY_RECORDED
Date: 2026-05-31

## Purpose
Re-record final foundation handoff after BEM-946 fixed the git push conflict class seen in operator screenshots.

## Important correction
Previous local runner summaries are not release proof if the GitHub job failed on push.
GitHub job failure overrides local completed summary.

## Current foundation state
- BEM-932 Block A: foundation policies
- BEM-933 Block B: object passports, contours, providers
- BEM-934 Block C: prompt templates and contracts
- BEM-935 Block D: schemas
- BEM-936 Block E: managed channel consumer
- BEM-937 Block F: dispatch lifecycle
- BEM-938 Block G: runners
- BEM-939 Block H: Telegram/reporting foundation
- BEM-940 Block I: proof hardening
- BEM-941 Block J: E2E foundation
- BEM-942 Block K: operator gates
- BEM-943 Block L: audit baseline
- BEM-944 Block M: validation status
- BEM-945 Block N: final handoff
- BEM-946: push stabilization

## Release boundary
Release PASS remains forbidden until remote/non-null CI or Git SHA is verified and external re-audit is complete.

No issue comments.
''')

write_file('governance/state/post_push_reverify_status.json', '''{
  "version": "1.0",
  "date": "2026-05-31",
  "status": "POST_PUSH_REVERIFY_RECORDED",
  "reason": "Operator screenshots showed push failure despite local completed summary.",
  "push_conflict_fixed_by": "BEM-946",
  "foundation_blocks": "14/14",
  "foundation_percent": 100,
  "release_pass": false,
  "release_blockers": [
    "commit_sha proof still requires verified remote/non-null CI SHA",
    "production Telegram remains operator-gated",
    "live LLM runtime remains operator-gated",
    "external Claude re-audit remains pending"
  ],
  "proof_policy": "workflow failure overrides local completed summary"
}
''')

write_file('governance/reports/BEM947_OPERATOR_SCREENSHOT_RESPONSE.md', '''# BEM-947 | Operator screenshot response
Status: SCREENSHOT_ISSUE_HANDLED
Date: 2026-05-31

The operator screenshots showed a real GitHub Actions failure:
- failed to push some refs
- fetch first
- process completed with exit code 1

Resolution:
- BEM-946 added push conflict policy and a safe push helper.
- BEM-947 records post-push reverify state.

Policy now enforced:
- A local SHA in job summary is not release proof if push failed.
- Release PASS requires remote/non-null SHA proof.
- Any future non-fast-forward push conflict must retry after fetch/rebase.

No issue comments.
''')

ctx=Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
append='''\n\n## BEM-947 completed | 2026-05-31\nRecorded post-push reverify after operator screenshots showed BEM-945 GitHub job failed on push despite local completed summary.\nCreated BEM947_POST_PUSH_REVERIFY, post_push_reverify_status and operator screenshot response.\nResult: POST_PUSH_REVERIFY_RECORDED. Foundation remains 14/14 by files, but release PASS remains false until remote/non-null SHA, production Telegram gate, live LLM gate and external re-audit.\nNo issue comments.\n'''
ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')+append, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(ctx))
ops_applied.append('BEM-947 post-push reverify recorded')
"""
